name: Possible Impacket SecretDump Remote Activity
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Samir Bousseaden, wagga
SIGMA Title: Possible Impacket SecretDump Remote Activity
SIGMA Description: Detect AD credential dumping using impacket secretdump HKTL

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\ADMIN$' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%system32*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.tmp%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Possible Impacket SecretDump Remote Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\ADMIN$' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%system32*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.tmp%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Possible Impacket SecretDump Remote Activity
